## Summary / 摘要

What problem does this pull request solve? / 此 PR 解决什么问题？

## Related issue / 关联 Issue

Closes #

## Change type / 改动类型

- [ ] Bug fix / Bug 修复
- [ ] Compatibility update / 兼容性更新
- [ ] Feature / 功能
- [ ] Documentation / 文档
- [ ] Test / 测试
- [ ] Theme or visual asset / 主题或视觉素材
- [ ] Refactor / 重构
- [ ] Other / 其他

## What changed? / 改动说明

List the key changes. / 请列出关键改动。

## Verification / 验证

- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds. / `npm run build` 成功。
- [ ] Relevant Rust tests pass. / 相关 Rust 测试通过。
- [ ] I tested the changed behavior manually. / 已手动测试改动行为。
- [ ] I verified restore official appearance when relevant. / 必要时已验证恢复官方外观。
- [ ] I updated documentation when needed. / 必要时已更新文档。

## Asset and privacy checklist / 素材与隐私检查

- [ ] This PR contains no API keys, tokens, private logs, private repository
      paths, or personal information. / 未包含 API Key、Token、私密日志、私有仓库路径或个人信息。
- [ ] This PR contains no unlicensed images, celebrity images, copyrighted
      artwork, or unclear third-party assets. / 未包含未授权图片、明星图片、受版权保护的艺术素材或来源不清的第三方素材。
- [ ] Included visual assets comply with [ASSET_POLICY.md](../ASSET_POLICY.md).
      / 所有视觉素材均符合 [ASSET_POLICY.md](../ASSET_POLICY.md)。

## Screenshots or recordings / 截图或录屏

Attach sanitized before-and-after evidence when the UI changes. / 若改动影响 UI，
请附上已脱敏的改动前后证据。

## Notes for reviewers / 给审核者的说明

Describe known limitations, compatibility concerns, or follow-up work. /
请说明已知限制、兼容性风险或后续工作。
